views.name: Formula 22.23a Result
views.definition: Ental values can be correlated within the same individual, while the second term accounts for the shared environmental values contributed by the other n−2 group members.
views.definition_zh: Formula 22.23a 对应的公式结论，用来支撑当前概念视图。
views.supporting_formula_latex: \sigma(e_{i},e_{j})=\left\{\begin{array}{ll}\sigma^{2}(e)&i=j\\ \rho\sigma^{2}(e)&i\neq j,i and j in the same group\\ 0&i\neq j,i and j in different groups\end{array}\right.
views.formula_section: Associative Effects: Competition, Social Interactions, Group and Kin Selection: Introduction

prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: Class Fitness 是由当前支撑公式引入的局部数学量。

introduced_concepts.name: Additive Genetic Component
introduced_concepts.definition: A component representing additive genetic contribution in the model.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 表示加性遗传贡献的模型组成部分。

introduced_concepts.name: Beta
introduced_concepts.definition: A model parameter, regression coefficient, or distribution-shape parameter named beta in the local context.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 局部模型中记为 beta 的参数、回归系数或分布形状参数。

introduced_concepts.name: Additive Genetic Value
introduced_concepts.definition: The additive genetic contribution to an individual or trait value.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 个体或性状值中的加性遗传贡献。

introduced_concepts.name: G
introduced_concepts.definition: E will shortly expand this result to allow for breeding values of associative effects.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: G 是当前公式涉及的背景概念，用来帮助解释模型中的生物学含义。

introduced_concepts.name: Index
introduced_concepts.definition: A position marker used to identify a class, state, or summation term.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 用于标记类别、状态或求和项位置的下标。

introduced_concepts.name: Count
introduced_concepts.definition: A discrete number of items, individuals, or events.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 对个体、事件或类别数量的离散计数。

introduced_concepts.name: Selection Coefficient
introduced_concepts.definition: A parameter measuring the strength of selection.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 衡量选择强度的参数。

introduced_concepts.name: Fitness
introduced_concepts.definition: A measure of reproductive success or contribution to the next generation.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 衡量个体繁殖成功或对下一代贡献的量。

introduced_concepts.name: Trait Value
introduced_concepts.definition: The numerical value of the phenotype or quantitative trait being modeled.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 表型或数量性状在模型中的数值。

views.name: Index
views.definition: A position marker used to identify a class, state, or summation term.
views.definition_zh: 用于标记类别、状态或求和项位置的下标。

views.name: Change
views.definition: Equation 22.59a (kin selection) and Equation 22.62a (multilevel selection).
views.definition_zh: Change 是当前公式中使用的函数或算子，用来把输入量转换为模型需要的输出。
views.supporting_formula_latex: \begin{aligned}&\beta_{w|\overline{z}}\overline{z}+\beta_{w|\Delta z}(z_{i}-\overline{z})=\beta_{w|\Delta z}z_{i}+(\beta_{w|\overline{z}}-\beta_{w|\Delta z})\overline{z}\\ &=\beta_{w|\Delta z}z_{i}+\frac{1}{n}\Big(\beta_{w|\overline{z}}-\beta_{w|\Delta z}\Big)\Big(z_{i}+\sum_{j\neq i}z_{j}\Big)\\ &=\frac{1}{n}\Big(\beta_{w|\overline{z}}+[n-1]\beta_{w|\Delta z}\Big)z_{i}+\frac{1}{n}\Big(\beta_{w|\overline{z}}-\beta_{w|\Delta z}\Big)\sum_{j\neq i}z_{j}\\ \end{aligned}
